save-modified-pdf-to-memorystream.title: Save Modified PDF to MemoryStream Using PdfPageEditor
save-modified-pdf-to-memorystream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with PdfPageEditor, applying a simple modification, and saving the result directly to a MemoryStream for further processing without writing to disk.

rotate-specific-pdf-pages.title: Rotate Specific PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-specific-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to rotate pages 3, 5, and 7 of a PDF by 180 degrees using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor facade.

set-page-zoom-to-150-percent.title: Set Page Zoom to 150% Using PdfPageEditor
set-page-zoom-to-150-percent.description: Shows how to adjust the zoom level of a specific PDF page (page 3) to 150% with Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfPageEditor.

rotate-all-pages-pdf-pageditor.title: Rotate All Pages of a PDF Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-all-pages-pdf-pageditor.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with PdfPageEditor, rotating every page 90° clockwise, and saving the edited document.

rotate-specific-pdf-page.title: Rotate Specific PDF Page Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-specific-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to rotate page 4 of a PDF document by 180 degrees using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor class.

zoom-even-pages-pdf.title: Zoom Even Pages of PDF Using PdfPageEditor
zoom-even-pages-pdf.description: Demonstrates applying a 1.2x zoom factor to all even‑numbered pages of a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

edit-pdf-pages-in-memory.title: Edit PDF Pages In-Memory with PdfPageEditor
edit-pdf-pages-in-memory.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a MemoryStream into PdfPageEditor, rotate a page, and save the edited PDF back to a stream or file without using intermediate files.

edit-pdf-pages-zoom-rotation.title: Edit PDF Pages with Zoom and Rotation using PdfPageEditor
edit-pdf-pages-zoom-rotation.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, setting a zoom factor and rotating all pages, applying the changes, and saving the edited document to a new file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

rotate-page-2-pdf-90-degrees.title: Rotate Page 2 of a PDF by 90 Degrees
rotate-page-2-pdf-90-degrees.description: Demonstrates how to rotate the second page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and the PageRotations dictionary, then save the modified file.

retrieve-pdf-page-size.title: Retrieve PDF Page Size with PdfPageEditor
retrieve-pdf-page-size.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, obtain the dimensions of the second page using PdfPageEditor.GetPageSize, and log the width and height.

get-page-rotation.title: Get Rotation Angle of a PDF Page
get-page-rotation.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with PdfPageEditor and retrieve the rotation angle of page 4.

resize-page-to-letter-size.title: Resize Specific PDF Page to Letter Size with PdfPageEditor
resize-page-to-letter-size.description: Shows how to change the size of a single page (page 6) in a PDF to Letter dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

set-page-transition-fade-2-sec.title: Set Page Transition to Fade with 2‑Second Duration
set-page-transition-fade-2-sec.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to apply a fade transition lasting two seconds to the first page of a PDF document.

apply-dissolve-transition-to-pdf-page.title: Apply Dissolve Transition to a Specific PDF Page
apply-dissolve-transition-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to set a Dissolve page transition with a three‑second duration on page 5 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-display-duration-page-five.title: Set Display Duration for a Specific PDF Page
set-display-duration-page-five.description: Demonstrates how to set the display duration of page 5 in a PDF to five seconds using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

left-align-page-two.title: Left Align Content of Page Two in PDF
left-align-page-two.description: Shows how to left‑justify the horizontal content of the second page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

vertically-align-page3-top.title: Vertically Align Page 3 to Top Using PdfPageEditor
vertically-align-page3-top.description: Demonstrates how to align the original content of the third page of a PDF to the top of the page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

resize-pdf-contents-10-percent-margins.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with 10% Margins
resize-pdf-contents-10-percent-margins.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize the contents of all pages in a PDF by applying a 10% margin on each side.

resize-specific-pdf-pages-with-custom-ma.title: Resize Specific PDF Pages with Custom Margins
resize-specific-pdf-pages-with-custom-ma.description: Demonstrates how to resize the contents of selected PDF pages (pages 2 and 4) by applying custom left and right margins using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

rotate-first-page-of-pdfs.title: Rotate First Page of PDFs in a Folder
rotate-first-page-of-pdfs.description: Shows how to batch‑process a directory of PDF files, rotating the first page of each document by 90 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-a4.title: Batch Convert PDFs to A4 Page Size
batch-convert-pdfs-to-a4.description: Demonstrates how to resize multiple PDF documents to A4 dimensions using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

rotate-resize-page3-to-letter.title: Rotate and Resize Page 3 to Letter Size
rotate-resize-page3-to-letter.description: Shows how to rotate the third page of a PDF by 90 degrees and change its dimensions to Letter size in a single operation using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

apply-zoom-to-selected-pdf-pages.title: Apply Zoom to Selected PDF Pages
apply-zoom-to-selected-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to select non‑consecutive pages using PdfPageEditor.ProcessPages and apply a common zoom factor to those pages.

set-transition-duration-for-page-range.title: Set Transition Duration for a Range of PDF Pages
set-transition-duration-for-page-range.description: Shows how to define a page range with the Pages collection and set each page's transition duration to one second using the PdfPageEditor facade.

validate-rotate-pdf-pages.title: Validate and Apply Rotation to PDF Pages
validate-rotate-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to validate a rotation angle (0, 90, 180, 270) and apply it to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

handle-invalid-page-rotation.title: Handle Invalid Page Rotation with PdfPageEditor
handle-invalid-page-rotation.description: Demonstrates catching InvalidValueFormatException when assigning an unsupported rotation value to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor and falling back to a valid rotation.

create-contentsresizeparameters-with-uni.title: Create ContentsResizeParameters with Uniform Margins
create-contentsresizeparameters-with-uni.description: Shows how to instantiate a ContentsResizeParameters object with 5‑point absolute margins on all sides using the static Margins method.

resize-pdf-contents-uniform-15-percent-m.title: Resize PDF Contents with Uniform 15% Margins
resize-pdf-contents-uniform-15-percent-m.description: Shows how to create a ContentsResizeParameters object with 15 % margins on all sides and use PdfFileEditor to resize the contents of a PDF file.

apply-different-zoom-levels-to-pdf-pages.title: Apply Different Zoom Levels to PDF Pages
apply-different-zoom-levels-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF and set a specific zoom factor using the PdfPageEditor facade.

apply-fade-transition-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Apply Fade (Dissolve) Transition to All PDF Pages
apply-fade-transition-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to set a dissolve (fade) page transition for every page in a PDF using the PdfPageEditor facade.

apply-conditional-page-transitions.title: Apply Conditional Page Transitions in PDF
apply-conditional-page-transitions.description: Demonstrates how to assign different page transition effects to each PDF page based on simple content heuristics (e.g., presence of images) using Aspose.Pdf facades.

set-per-page-display-duration-based-on-w.title: Set Per‑Page Display Duration Based on Word Count
set-per-page-display-duration-based-on-w.description: Shows how to calculate a display duration for each PDF page proportional to its word count and apply the duration using the PdfPageEditor facade.

edit-pdf-in-memory-using-pdfpageeditor.title: Edit PDF In-Memory Using PdfPageEditor
edit-pdf-in-memory-using-pdfpageeditor.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF from a byte array, modify page zoom and rotation with PdfPageEditor, and save the result back to a byte array using only in‑memory streams.

chain-page-rotation-size-zoom.title: Chain Page Rotation, Size, and Zoom Modifications
chain-page-rotation-size-zoom.description: Shows how to apply multiple page property changes—rotation, page size, and zoom—sequentially using PdfPageEditor and save the modified PDF.

reset-rotation-of-pdf-page.title: Reset Rotation of a Specific PDF Page
reset-rotation-of-pdf-page.description: Shows how to reset the rotation of page 6 in a PDF document to 0 degrees using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

restore-original-page-size.title: Restore Original Size of Page 8 in a PDF
restore-original-page-size.description: Demonstrates how to capture a PDF page's original dimensions, modify the page size, and then revert it back using Aspose.Pdf and the PdfPageEditor facade.

log-pdf-page-dimensions-rotation.title: Log PDF Page Dimensions and Rotation Before and After Editing
log-pdf-page-dimensions-rotation.description: Demonstrates how to capture page width, height, and rotation values of a PDF before and after applying a rotation edit, and writes the audit information to a text file.

safely-get-pdf-page-size.title: Safely Retrieve PDF Page Sizes with Error Handling
safely-get-pdf-page-size.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF with PdfPageEditor, retrieving each page's dimensions, and using try‑catch to handle requests for pages that do not exist.

set-horizontal-alignment-for-pdf-pages.title: Set Horizontal Alignment for All PDF Pages
set-horizontal-alignment-for-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to apply a left‑justified horizontal alignment to every page in a PDF and save the modified document.

apply-vertical-alignment-to-selected-pdf.title: Apply Vertical Alignment to Selected PDF Pages
apply-vertical-alignment-to-selected-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to set top vertical alignment on specific pages of a PDF and save the modified document.

apply-boxout-transition-to-pdf-page.title: Apply BoxOut Transition to PDF Page
apply-boxout-transition-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to set a BoxOut page transition with a three‑second duration on a specific page using Aspose.Pdf.

set-cover-page-transition.title: Set Cover Page Transition on PDF Page
set-cover-page-transition.description: Demonstrates how to apply a Cover transition with a 1‑second duration to page 4 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-zoom-of-page-five.title: Set Zoom of Specific PDF Page
set-zoom-of-page-five.description: Demonstrates how to change the zoom level of page 5 in a PDF to 75 % using Aspose.Pdf.Facades. The example loads a PDF, applies the zoom setting, and saves the result.

set-zoom-of-page-to-double-magnification.title: Set Zoom of Specific PDF Page to Double Magnification
set-zoom-of-page-to-double-magnification.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to set a 2.0 zoom factor (200 % magnification) on page 7 of a PDF and save the result.

resize-pdf-page-contents-by-percentage.title: Resize PDF Page Contents by Percentage
resize-pdf-page-contents-by-percentage.description: Demonstrates how to shrink the contents of all pages in a PDF by 5% using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor, effectively adding a uniform negative margin.

add-20-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.title: Add 20% Margins to PDF Pages
add-20-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add a 20% whitespace margin around each page of a PDF for printing using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

convert-pdf-page-orientation-to-landscap.title: Convert PDF Page Orientation to Landscape (A4)
convert-pdf-page-orientation-to-landscap.description: Shows how to change a PDF's page orientation from portrait to landscape by setting the PageSize to A4 landscape dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

convert-pdf-portrait-to-landscape.title: Convert PDF Page from Portrait to Landscape
convert-pdf-portrait-to-landscape.description: Shows how to change a PDF page's orientation from portrait to landscape by swapping the width and height via the PageSize property and rotating the page so the content remains upright.

rotate-pdf-pages-preserve-transitions.title: Rotate PDF Pages While Preserving Transitions
rotate-pdf-pages-preserve-transitions.description: Demonstrates how to rotate all pages of a PDF by 180 degrees using PdfPageEditor without affecting any existing page transition settings.

resize-pdf-contents-rotate-pages.title: Resize PDF Page Contents and Rotate Pages by 90 Degrees
resize-pdf-contents-rotate-pages.description: The example adds 10% margins to the content of all PDF pages, then rotates each page 90 degrees, producing a new PDF with the adjusted layout.

save-pdf-incremental-update.title: Save PDF with Incremental Update Using Aspose.Pdf
save-pdf-incremental-update.description: Demonstrates adding a text annotation to a PDF and saving the changes using incremental update mode to preserve the original file structure, then writing the updated document to a new file via the Facades API.

edit-pdf-save-new-file-using-pdfpageedit.title: Edit PDF and Save as New File Using PdfPageEditor
edit-pdf-save-new-file-using-pdfpageedit.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF with PdfPageEditor, applying a modification (zoom), and saving the edited document to a separate file while keeping the original unchanged.

set-page-display-duration-for-pdf-slides.title: Set Page Display Duration for PDF Slideshow
set-page-display-duration-for-pdf-slides.description: Demonstrates how to assign a uniform display duration to each page of a PDF, enabling a timed slideshow using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

apply-split-transition-to-pdf-page.title: Apply Split Transition to PDF Page
apply-split-transition-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to set a split page transition lasting two seconds on page three of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

disable-page-transition-animation.title: Disable Page Transition Animation on a Specific PDF Page
disable-page-transition-animation.description: Shows how to set the transition duration to zero for page 6 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor, thereby disabling the page transition animation.

apply-sequential-page-transitions.title: Apply Sequential Page Transitions to PDF
apply-sequential-page-transitions.description: Shows how to assign different transition effects to each page of a PDF by using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade and saving the result.

set-pdf-page-zoom-to-100.title: Set PDF Page Zoom to 100% Using PdfPageEditor
set-pdf-page-zoom-to-100.description: Demonstrates how to set the zoom level of all pages in a PDF to 1.0 (100%) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

apply-zoom-to-odd-pdf-pages.title: Apply Zoom to Odd Pages in a PDF
apply-zoom-to-odd-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to set a 1.2 zoom factor on all odd‑numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

set-zoom-for-even-pages.title: Set Zoom for Even Pages in PDF
set-zoom-for-even-pages.description: Shows how to apply a zoom factor of 0.8 to all even‑numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

resize-pdf-pages-3-6-to-us-letter.title: Resize PDF Pages 3-6 to US Letter Size
resize-pdf-pages-3-6-to-us-letter.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor to change the size of specific pages (3‑6) to US Letter dimensions and save the modified document.

resize-last-page-to-a5.title: Resize Last PDF Page to A5 for Booklet
resize-last-page-to-a5.description: Shows how to change the size of the final page of a PDF to A5 using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor, enabling a compact booklet layout.

rotate-every-third-page-270-degrees.title: Rotate Every Third PDF Page by 270 Degrees
rotate-every-third-page-270-degrees.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to rotate every third page of a PDF by 270° to achieve alternating landscape orientation.

retrieve-page-size-after-rotation.title: Retrieve Page Size After Rotating a PDF Page
retrieve-page-size-after-rotation.description: Shows how to rotate a PDF page using PdfPageEditor and then obtain the updated page dimensions to verify the new orientation.

retrieve-verify-page-rotation-after-resi.title: Retrieve and Verify Page Rotation After Resizing PDF
retrieve-verify-page-rotation-after-resi.description: Demonstrates how to get a PDF page's rotation, change the page size using PdfPageEditor, and confirm that the rotation value stays the same after saving the document.

apply-custom-page-transitions.title: Apply Custom Page Transitions Based on Index
apply-custom-page-transitions.description: Shows how to assign different transition effects to each PDF page by iterating through pages with PdfPageEditor and saving the modified document.

set-incremental-display-duration-for-pdf.title: Set Incremental Display Duration for PDF Pages
set-incremental-display-duration-for-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to assign a display duration to each PDF page, increasing by one second for each subsequent page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

center-content-horizontally-page2.title: Center Content Horizontally on Specific PDF Page
center-content-horizontally-page2.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor to horizontally center the existing content on page 2 of a PDF document.

vertically-center-content-page-three.title: Vertically Center Content on Specific PDF Page
vertically-center-content-page-three.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to align the existing content of page 3 to the vertical middle of the page and save the modified PDF.

set-horizontal-alignment-and-zoom-for-pa.title: Set Horizontal Alignment and Zoom for a Specific PDF Page
set-horizontal-alignment-and-zoom-for-pa.description: Demonstrates how to center‑align content and apply a zoom factor to a single page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

add-10-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.title: Add 10% Margins to All PDF Pages
add-10-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to add a 10% margin on every side of each page in a PDF, producing a resized document ready for printing.

batch-set-fade-transition-pdf.title: Batch Set Fade Transition for PDF Pages
batch-set-fade-transition-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to apply a fade (dissolve) transition with a two‑second duration to all pages of a PDF, creating a slideshow effect using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-pdf-pages-from-stream.title: Rotate PDF Pages from a Stream and Save Back
rotate-pdf-pages-from-stream.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a memory/network stream, rotate all pages by 90°, and overwrite the same stream using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

resize-pdf-pages-from-byte-array.title: Resize PDF Pages from Byte Array using PdfPageEditor
resize-pdf-pages-from-byte-array.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a byte array, change all pages to a specific size (A4) with PdfPageEditor, and save the modified document to a file.

properly-dispose-pdfpageeditor-after-edi.title: Properly Dispose PdfPageEditor After Editing
properly-dispose-pdfpageeditor-after-edi.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF to PdfPageEditor, applying rotation and zoom, saving the edited file, and correctly disposing the editor to release file handles and unmanaged resources.

set-custom-page-size-pdfpageeditor.title: Set Custom Page Size Using PdfPageEditor
set-custom-page-size-pdfpageeditor.description: Shows how to change a PDF's page dimensions to non‑standard sizes by specifying custom width and height values with PdfPageEditor.

rotate-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor.title: Rotate PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor.description: Shows how to rotate all pages of a PDF by setting the Rotation property of PdfPageEditor and saving the modified document.

set-page-transition-effects.title: Set Page Transition Effects in PDF
set-page-transition-effects.description: Shows how to apply Fade, BoxOut, and Cover transitions to individual PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

set-pdf-page-zoom.title: Set PDF Page Zoom Using PdfPageEditor
set-pdf-page-zoom.description: Shows how to apply a double‑precision zoom factor to a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor for high‑resolution output.

set-slide-display-duration-pdf.title: Set Slide Display Duration for PDF Presentation
set-slide-display-duration-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to set a per-page display duration and optional transition effect for a PDF used as a presentation using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-page-alignment-with-pdfpageeditor.title: Set Page Alignment with PdfPageEditor
set-page-alignment-with-pdfpageeditor.description: Demonstrates how to change the horizontal alignment of PDF pages using the PdfPageEditor facade.

resize-pdf-contents-uniform-margins.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with Uniform Margins
resize-pdf-contents-uniform-margins.description: Shows how to uniformly resize the contents of all pages in a PDF by applying percentage‑based margins using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

resize-pdf-contents-asymmetric-margins.title: Resize PDF Contents with Asymmetric Margins
resize-pdf-contents-asymmetric-margins.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor to resize page contents by applying different left, right, top, and bottom margins, with fallback PDF creation if the source file is missing.

resize-pdf-contents-top-bottom-margins.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with Different Top and Bottom Margins
resize-pdf-contents-top-bottom-margins.description: Shows how to use PdfFileEditor.ContentsResizeParameters to set left/right margins and distinct top and bottom margins while resizing the contents of PDF pages.

rotate-pdf-page-restore-orientation.title: Rotate PDF Page and Restore Original Orientation
rotate-pdf-page-restore-orientation.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a specific PDF page using PdfPageEditor, save the rotated document, then reset the page to its original rotation and save the restored version.

change-pdf-page-size-and-undo.title: Change PDF Page Size and Undo to Original
change-pdf-page-size-and-undo.description: Shows how to set a custom page size for a PDF page, save the modified file, then revert to the original dimensions to test undo functionality.

log-pdf-page-modifications.title: Log PDF Page Property Modifications with PdfPageEditor
log-pdf-page-modifications.description: Shows how to change various page properties using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and record each modification to a log file for audit and debugging.

report-pdf-page-properties-before-after-.title: Report PDF Page Properties Before and After Edits
report-pdf-page-properties-before-after-.description: Loads a PDF, prints each page's size, rotation, and zoom, applies rotation, zoom, and page size changes, then prints the updated values and saves the edited document.

rotate-pages-encrypted-pdf.title: Rotate Pages of Encrypted PDF using PdfPageEditor
rotate-pages-encrypted-pdf.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF by supplying a password, rotating all pages 90 degrees with PdfPageEditor, and saving the edited document.

modify-signed-pdf-pages.title: Modify Pages in a Signed PDF While Preserving Signature
modify-signed-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to rotate and resize a specific page of a digitally signed PDF using PdfPageEditor, applying changes as an incremental update so the existing signature stays valid.

resize-pdf-pages-preserve-annotations.title: Resize PDF Pages While Preserving Annotations
resize-pdf-pages-preserve-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to change the page size of a PDF (e.g., to A4) using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor while keeping all existing content, annotations, form fields, and links functional.

rotate-pdf-pages-preserve-form-fields.title: Rotate PDF Pages While Preserving Form Fields
rotate-pdf-pages-preserve-form-fields.description: Shows how to rotate all pages of a PDF by 90 degrees using PdfPageEditor, ensuring that existing form fields remain usable after the orientation change.

apply-transition-to-odd-pages.title: Apply Transition to Odd Pages in PDF
apply-transition-to-odd-pages.description: Shows how to add a page transition effect only to odd‑numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

set-display-duration-even-pages.title: Set Display Duration for Even Pages in PDF
set-display-duration-even-pages.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to assign a custom display duration only to even‑numbered pages of a PDF document.

zoom-pdf-pages-with-images.title: Zoom PDF Pages Containing Images
zoom-pdf-pages-with-images.description: Shows how to detect pages that have image objects in a PDF and apply a zoom factor only to those pages using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-contents-only-on-text-pages.title: Resize PDF Contents Only on Pages Containing Text
resize-contents-only-on-text-pages.description: The example loads a PDF, detects which pages contain any text using TextAbsorber, and then resizes the contents of only those pages with specified margin percentages via PdfFileEditor.

apply-rotation-zoom-transition-to-pdf-pa.title: Apply Rotation, Zoom, and Transition Effects to PDF Pages
apply-rotation-zoom-transition-to-pdf-pa.description: Demonstrates how to rotate, zoom and add slide transition effects to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-pdf-pages-a4-landscape.title: Set PDF Pages to A4 Landscape Size
set-pdf-pages-a4-landscape.description: Shows how to change each page of a PDF to A4 landscape dimensions by adjusting the Width, Height, and IsLandscape properties and then saving the document.

set-pdf-page-size-to-custom-letter.title: Set PDF Page Size to Custom Letter Portrait
set-pdf-page-size-to-custom-letter.description: Shows how to change the page size of an existing PDF to the standard Letter portrait dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

rotate-landscape-pdf-pages.title: Rotate Landscape PDF Pages to Portrait
rotate-landscape-pdf-pages.description: Detects pages whose width exceeds height (landscape) and rotates them 90° to portrait orientation using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-pdf-page-transition-duration-by-titl.title: Set PDF Page Transition Duration Based on Title Length
set-pdf-page-transition-duration-by-titl.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, creates a placeholder title, calculates a transition duration from the title length, and applies a page transition using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

adjust-page-zoom-based-on-word-count.title: Adjust Page Zoom Based on Word Count
adjust-page-zoom-based-on-word-count.description: Shows how to extract text from each PDF page, count its words, and apply a higher zoom factor to pages with fewer words using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-change-pdf-page-size.title: Batch Change PDF Page Size Based on File Name
batch-change-pdf-page-size.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDFs, determine a target page size from each file name, and apply the new size to all pages using Aspose.Pdf facades.

extract-rotate-selected-pdf-pages.title: Extract and Rotate Selected PDF Pages
extract-rotate-selected-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to extract specific pages from a PDF, rotate them, and save the modified pages as a new PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

merge-pdfs-with-aligned-margins.title: Merge PDFs with Aligned Margins
merge-pdfs-with-aligned-margins.description: Shows how to add uniform margins to multiple PDF files and then concatenate them into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

resize-pdf-pages-and-split-into-chapters.title: Resize PDF Pages and Split into Chapters
resize-pdf-pages-and-split-into-chapters.description: Demonstrates how to uniformly resize all pages of a PDF and then split the resized document into separate chapter files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-pdf-slideshow-with-page-transitio.title: Create PDF Slideshow with Page Transitions
create-pdf-slideshow-with-page-transitio.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor to assign transition effects and display durations to each page, producing a PDF that plays as a slideshow.

set-boxout-transition-zoom-page.title: Set BoxOut Transition and Zoom on PDF Page
set-boxout-transition-zoom-page.description: Shows how to apply a BoxOut page transition with a 1.3× zoom factor to page 2 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

center-page-content-set-display-duration.title: Center Page Content and Set Display Duration on Specific PDF Page
center-page-content-set-display-duration.description: Demonstrates how to center the content of page 5 horizontally and set its display duration to 4 seconds using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

add-5-percent-margins-and-print-pdf.title: Add 5% Margins and Print PDF with Auto‑Resize
add-5-percent-margins-and-print-pdf.description: The example adds a 5 % margin to all pages of a PDF using PdfFileEditor, then prints the modified document with auto‑resize to fit the printable area.

apply-15-percent-margins-booklet.title: Apply 15% Margins for Booklet Layout
apply-15-percent-margins-booklet.description: Demonstrates how to add 15 % margins to selected or all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, preparing the document for booklet printing.

rotate-pdf-pages-to-landscape-brochure.title: Rotate PDF Pages to Landscape for Brochure Printing
rotate-pdf-pages-to-landscape-brochure.description: Shows how to rotate all pages of a PDF to landscape orientation and set the page size to A4 for brochure printing using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

resize-pdf-pages-to-a3.title: Resize PDF Pages to A3 Size
resize-pdf-pages-to-a3.description: Shows how to change the size of all pages in a PDF to A3 using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-pdf-page-zoom-preview-final.title: Set PDF Page Zoom for Preview and Final Output
set-pdf-page-zoom-preview-final.description: Shows how to generate two PDF versions with different zoom levels (50% preview and 100% final) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

adjust-pdf-page-properties-from-json.title: Adjust PDF Page Properties from JSON Configuration
adjust-pdf-page-properties-from-json.description: Demonstrates reading a JSON file and applying rotation, zoom, alignment, size, and transition settings to selected PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

hybrid-content-resize-mixed-margins.title: Hybrid Content Resize with Mixed Percent and Unit Margins
hybrid-content-resize-mixed-margins.description: Shows how to create a ContentsResizeParameters object that combines percentage‑based and absolute margins, then apply it to resize specific PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-page-transitions-by-index.title: Apply Page Transitions Based on Page Index
apply-page-transitions-by-index.description: Demonstrates how to set different PDF page transition effects using PdfPageEditor, selecting the transition type with a modulo‑3 pattern over the pages.

apply-rotation-size-zoom-to-pdf-pages.title: Apply Rotation, Size, and Zoom to PDF Pages
apply-rotation-size-zoom-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade to rotate pages, set custom page dimensions, and apply a zoom factor before saving the modified PDF.
